params_used.custom_text: // This module selects between two 8-bit inputs, `w_bus_mux_in_0` and `w_bus_mux_in_1`, based on the value of the `w_channel` control input. When `w_channel` is high (1), the output `w_bus_mux_out` will be equal to `w_bus_mux_in_0`; when `w_channel` is low (0), the output will be equal to `w_bus_mux_in_1`.
